name: ReviewResponseOrchestrator

neutralConcepts: Ownership check at executionOrder=1 — reviewerId must match review.ownerId
revision_allowed:true ONLY for content_policy rejection reason
NEW_KEY_VARIANT revision strategy: second SETNX key = hash(tenantId+':'+reviewId+':response-revision-1')
Does NOT emit reputation.updated — aggregation handled by T171

ironRules.rule: Ownership check (reviewerId === review.ownerId) at executionOrder=1 — before any write. Emits ReviewResponseRejected(not_owner, revision_allowed:false).
SETNX deduplication at executionOrder=2 — key = hash(tenantId+reviewId+'response'). Already-responded emits ReviewResponseRejected(already_responded, revision_allowed:false).
revision_allowed:true ONLY for content_policy rejection reason. not_owner and already_responded must carry revision_allowed:false.
DNA-8: storeDocument(response record) BEFORE enqueue(ReviewResponsePublished or ReviewResponseRejected).
T172 does NOT emit reputation.updated. Reputation aggregation is owned by T171 via T171's event subscription.

keywords: review response ownership content policy revision allowed not_owner already_responded SETNX NEW_KEY_VARIANT
